summary: Frozen section is not shown to change surgical management plans in multinodular thyroid disease; decisions remain based primarily on preoperative assessments like FNA and imaging rather than intraoperative pathologic findings. Surgical strategies such as extent of resection stay unchanged regardless of frozen section outcomes.
